scripts.build: npm run identity:verify && vite build && node scripts/app-fallbacks.mjs
scripts.deploy:preflight: npm run guard:canonical && npm run guard:public-deploy-boundary && npm run copy:audit && npm run guard:mirrorprod-media:self-check && npm run build && npm run guard:mirrorprod-links && npm run guard:mirrorprod-media && npm run site:worker:dry
scripts.deploy:verify: npm run smoke:interaction && npm run smoke:browser && npm run canary:mirrorprod-media && npm run canary:prod && npm run redteam:prod-smoke && npm run qa:user-prompts && npm run qa:live-user
scripts.cf:r2:list: node scripts/cloudflare-wrangler.mjs r2 bucket list --config worker/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.cf:r2:create:media: node scripts/cloudflare-wrangler.mjs r2 bucket create active-mirror-media --config worker/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.cf:kv:create:media: node scripts/cloudflare-wrangler.mjs kv namespace create active-mirror-media --binding MIRROR_MEDIA_KV --config worker/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.site:worker:dry: npm run guard:public-deploy-boundary && node scripts/cloudflare-wrangler.mjs deploy --config wrangler.site.jsonc --dry-run
scripts.site:worker:deploy: npm run guard:public-deploy-boundary && npm run guard:mirrorprod-links && npm run guard:mirrorprod-media && node scripts/cloudflare-wrangler.mjs deploy --config wrangler.site.jsonc
scripts.worker:test: npm run identity:verify && node worker/test/mirror-kernel.test.mjs && node worker/test/gateway-guardrails.test.mjs && node worker/test/first-turn-quality.test.mjs && node scripts/conversation-quality-harness.mjs
scripts.canary:mirrorprod-media:nightly: MIRRORPROD_PLAY_ALL=1 MIRRORPROD_PLAY_TO_END=1 MIRRORPROD_BROWSERS=chromium,firefox,webkit MIRRORPROD_VIEWPORTS=mobile,desktop MIRRORPROD_PROBE_AUDIO=1 node scripts/mirrorprod-media-gate.mjs live
